changes.value:
## What

Remove the entire swimlane concept from the Rust codebase. This is a deletion-heavy card.

### Files to delete:
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/swimlane/mod.rs`
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/swimlane/add.rs`
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/swimlane/get.rs`
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/swimlane/update.rs`
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/swimlane/delete.rs`
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/swimlane/list.rs`

### Files to modify:
- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/lib.rs`** ŌĆö remove `mod swimlane` and its re-exports
- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/types/ids.rs`** ŌĆö remove `define_id!(SwimlaneId, ...)`
- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/types/mod.rs`** ŌĆö remove `SwimlaneId` re-export
- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/types/operation.rs`** ŌĆö remove `Noun::Swimlane`, `Noun::Swimlanes` and their match arms
- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/types/position.rs`** ŌĆö remove `swimlane: Option<SwimlaneId>` from `Position`, simplify to `column + ordinal` only
- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/error.rs`** ŌĆö remove `SwimlaneNotFound`, `SwimlaneHasTasks` variants
- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/dispatch.rs`** ŌĆö remove all swimlane dispatch routes and imports
- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/task/add.rs`** ŌĆö remove `swimlane` field from `AddTask`
- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/task/mv.rs`** ŌĆö remove `swimlane` from `MoveTask`, remove `with_swimlane` and `to_column_and_swimlane`
- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/task/update.rs`** ŌĆö remove `swimlane` field
- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/task/next.rs`** ŌĆö remove swimlane filter
- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/task/list.rs`** ŌĆö remove swimlane filter
- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/task/paste.rs`** ŌĆö remove swimlane handling
- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/task/complete.rs`** ŌĆö remove swimlane handling
- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/task/cut.rs`** ŌĆö remove swimlane handling
- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/task_helpers.rs`** ŌĆö remove swimlane references
- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/board/get.rs`** ŌĆö remove swimlane collection from board response
- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/board/init.rs`** ŌĆö remove swimlane directory creation if any
- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/context.rs`** ŌĆö remove swimlane references
- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/schema.rs`** ŌĆö remove swimlane references
- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/scope_commands.rs`** ŌĆö remove swimlane references
- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/tests/command_dispatch_integration.rs`** ŌĆö remove all swimlane tests

### Also check:
- `swissarmyhammer-entity/src/io.rs` and `watcher.rs` for swimlane references
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/parse/mod.rs` for swimlane parsing
- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/defaults.rs` for swimlane defaults

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No file in `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/swimlane/` exists
- [ ] `grep -r swimlane swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/` returns zero hits (except comments if any)
- [ ] `Position` struct is `{ column, ordinal }` only
- [ ] `cargo build -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` compiles cleanly
- [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` passes

## Tests
- [ ] All existing tests that reference swimlane are updated or removed
- [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` passes
- [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-entity` passes

## Workflow
- Use `/tdd` ŌĆö write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
Rust: Remove swimlane module and all references

 - **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/task/add.rs`** ŌĆö remove `swimlane` field from `AddTask`

@@ -27,22 +30,25 @@
 - **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/task/complete.rs`** ŌĆö remove swimlane handling
 - **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/task/cut.rs`** ŌĆö remove swimlane handling
 - **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/task_helpers.rs`** ŌĆö remove swimlane references
-- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/board/get.rs`** ŌĆö remove swimlane collection from board response
+- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/board/get.rs`** ŌĆö replace `swimlanes` collection with `projects` in board response
 - **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/board/init.rs`** ŌĆö remove swimlane directory creation if any
 - **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/context.rs`** ŌĆö remove swimlane references
 - **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/schema.rs`** ŌĆö remove swimlane references
 - **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/scope_commands.rs`** ŌĆö remove swimlane references
+- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/defaults.rs`** ŌĆö remove swimlane defaults
+- **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/parse/mod.rs`** ŌĆö remove swimlane parsing
 - **`swissarmyhammer-kanban/tests/command_dispatch_integration.rs`** ŌĆö remove all swimlane tests

 ### Also check:

-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/parse/mod.rs` for swimlane parsing
-- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/defaults.rs` for swimlane defaults

 ## Acceptance Criteria
 - [ ] No file in `swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/swimlane/` exists
-- [ ] `grep -r swimlane swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/` returns zero hits (except comments if any)
+- [ ] `swimlane.yaml` entity and `position_swimlane.yaml` field definition deleted
